title: Effective date
doc_html:
§2070.  Effective date

The provisions of this Part shall become effective on September 1, 1970.

Added by Acts 1970, No. 81, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 22:1394 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.
doc_text:
§2070.  Effective date
The provisions of this Part shall become effective on September 1, 1970.
Added by Acts 1970, No. 81, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 22:1394 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.
